---
title: "Francis Randle Twemlow"
---

## Francis Randle Twemlow

**Dates:** (1852-1908)

### Description

nephew of Fanny Wilbraham, pupil at Winchester College

### Biography

Son of the Rev. Francis Cradock Twemlow and Charlotte Wilbraham;  he went to Winchester College in 1866;  he later joined the army and served in the Boer War.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 21 [1868[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
